{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320175538121C89263A81110038B5"}"},"total":1123},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7610429798155256638","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"大大快快加更更更更更，别让自己累着也别让自己歇着[大笑][大笑][大笑]真的特别好看 非常新颖的开始非常有趣的设定，218岁的上大学的小狐狸在学校进入无限回廊碰到的邪神是自己养过的崽，绝了！！！[雀食神作][雀食神作][雀食神作] 每个人都很有趣感觉狐狐是救世主来的！百里嘉良（中二病老师我们喜欢你！！）一位执着的邪神研究者，推荐大家都来看，我从来不推凡品[害羞][害羞][害羞]","text_exts":[{"e":131,"s":128,"text":"救世主","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%95%91%E4%B8%96%E4%B8%BB&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774000539110038B5%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227610429798155256638%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227469750869416741912%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%95%91%E4%B8%96%E4%B8%BB%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1771943524,"group_id":"7469750869416741912","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N9WX9XU5GEhH/+iGHexJ958Gt+6rcTb4FdynZB+WaQuZ","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"1465013288316247","user_name":"踏踏实实的赢旭危"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1465013288316247","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7469750869416741912","book_info":{"abstract":"（双男主+软萌团宠+切片1V1+扮猪吃老虎）
温稚宁一生行善积德，连打养成游戏都矜矜业业，却很不幸，被选中拉进了无限流恐怖惊悚世界。
为了活命，他非常自觉地躲在大佬身后打CALL，彩虹屁一箩筐。
谁知游戏中……
智力远超常人，毕生心愿是将所有人类的大脑物理改造的邪恶博士，当众感谢他曾送来的研究经费；
杀人如麻的愉悦犯“神明”，在月圆之夜主动献上冰冷的吻，选他做新娘；
精神病院主刀医生刚下手术台，一边擦拭着满是鲜血的手术刀，一边委屈地喊他哥哥……
温稚宁目瞪口呆。
等等！
这、这不是我曾经玩养成游戏时养的那些可爱崽崽们吗！？怎么一个个都变成这样了！？？画风都不一样了啊！！！
而且最重要的是——不要打着想见我的旗号强行把我拉进剧情中心，体验hard模式啊！
别扒拉我！我现在和你们不是一伙儿的！没见那些大佬们看我的眼神都不对了吗！？
温稚宁生无可恋，被黑化后占有欲强到爆棚的崽崽们追的抱头鼠窜，并在聊天群疯狂刷屏：大佬们！菜菜，求捞捞！T.T
大佬们：勿cue，捞不动，真的捞不动。
温稚宁：0.0
邪神：我捞得动，我来捞。
温稚宁：感恩感恩感恩，谢谢谢谢谢谢……等等？？？聊天群里混入了什么奇怪的东西！！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/87657380818fc1b101ee96b8ae486a48","author":"桑沅","author_id":"","book_id":"7469750869416741912","book_name":"无限流，别人逃命我恋综，这对吗","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#101010","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":275,"name":"双男主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=275&name=双男主&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":93,"name":"扮猪吃虎","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=93&name=扮猪吃虎&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":94,"name":"团宠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=94&name=团宠&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":70,"name":"无限流","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=70&name=无限流&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":757,"name":"现代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=757&name=现代&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":841,"name":"群像","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=841&name=群像&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1012,"name":"纯爱","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1012&name=纯爱&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7469752516238918168","read_count":"19273","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1267213"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.2","serial_count":"451","tags":"双男主,无限流,扮猪吃虎,团宠,现代,群像,纯爱","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/de6294eb94fd11717e42824fb5c11f8d~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779184539&x-signature=m20bfmTL5N0H3nvCUUZc0YfXHlM%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2859151321220743","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"218"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320175538121C89263A81110038B5"}"},"relate
